session_id.Description: Scanning session, in this study there are two scan session on two separate days

sleep_last_night.Description: Number of hours participant slept in the previous night of scan session

caffeine_before_scan.Description: Participants were asked if they consumed caffeine before the scan session

caffene_hours_before.Description: If participants consumed caffeine before scan, they were asked how many hours before scan did they consume caffeine to the nearest half hour

caffeine_type.Description: If participants consumed caffeine before scan, they were what type and how much caffeine did they consume (e.g., 1 can of soda)
